9.description: return only teigid column for final output

1.description: get kommunenummer and geometry for Trondheim kommune

2.description: inspect distinct quick-clay risk class values in utlosningomr

4.description: select utlosningomr polygons filtered to the chosen high-risk class (class value chosen from step 2/3 results)

5.description: reduce the selected quick-clay polygons to Trondheim extent (join kommuner step1 with kvikkleire step4)

6.description: select parcels (teig) in Trondheim by filtering on kommunenummer

7.description: find parcels that intersect the reduced high-risk quick-clay polygons (teig step6 left, kvikkleire step5 right)

8.description: produce one row per parcel teigid (group by teigid) from the intersecting parcels

-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]

SELECT identifier, description FROM kvikkleire_175185730654415d8841436d0d6999f2.skredrisikokvikkleireklasse ORDER BY identifier;

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 4: query [kvikkleire]
SELECT u.skredrisikokvikkleireklasse, u.omrade FROM kvikkleire_175185730654415d8841436d0d6999f2.utlosningomr u WHERE u.skredrisikokvikkleireklasse = '4';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 5: spatial_join
-- left_source: 1
-- right_source: 4
-- join_type: "intersects"
-- left_geom: "omrade"
-- right_geom: "omrade"

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

SELECT teigid, omrade FROM matrikkeleneiendomskartteig_36313fab8faa42d99cb779d86d1ca26d.teig WHERE kommunenummer = '5001';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 7: spatial_join
-- left_source: 6
-- right_source: 5
-- join_type: "intersects"
-- left_geom: "omrade"
-- right_geom: "omrade"

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 8: aggregate
-- source_step: 7
-- aggregation_type: "min"
-- group_by: ["teigid"]
-- metric_column: "distance_m"
-- metric_as: "distance_m"

final_sql:
-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT kommunenummer, omrade FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%Trondheim%' ORDER BY gyldigfra DESC LIMIT 1;

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [kvikkleire]
SELECT DISTINCT skredrisikokvikkleireklasse FROM kvikkleire_175185730654415d8841436d0d6999f2.utlosningomr ORDER BY skredrisikokvikkleireklasse;

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 3: query [kvikkleire]
SELECT identifier, description FROM kvikkleire_175185730654415d8841436d0d6999f2.skredrisikokvikkleireklasse ORDER BY identifier;

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 4: query [kvikkleire]
SELECT u.skredrisikokvikkleireklasse, u.omrade FROM kvikkleire_175185730654415d8841436d0d6999f2.utlosningomr u WHERE u.skredrisikokvikkleireklasse = '4';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 5: query [matrikkeleneiendomskartteig]
SELECT teigid, omrade FROM matrikkeleneiendomskartteig_36313fab8faa42d99cb779d86d1ca26d.teig WHERE kommunenummer = '5001';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 6: spatial_join
-- left_source: 5
-- right_source: 4
-- join_type: "intersects"
-- left_geom: "omrade"
-- right_geom: "omrade"
